meta.title: Opinion 68: Designation of Strain B213c (DSM 20284) in Place of Strain NCDO 1859 as the Type Strain of Pediococcus acidilactici Lindner 1887: Judicial Commission of the International Committee on Systematic Bacteriology

abstractHtml: The Judicial Commission designated strain B213c (= DSM 20284) as the type strain of Pediococcus acidilactici in place of strain NCDO 1859, which seems to belong in the species Pediococcus pentosaceus.
